reading.text: Hello! My name is Tom. I am from New York. I am a teacher. I like coffee and books. Every morning, I drink coffee and read the news.
reading.translation: A man named Tom introduces himself, his job, and his morning routine.

reading.text: This is my family. My mother's name is Susan. My father's name is John. I have one brother and one sister. My brother is older than me. My sister is younger.

reading.text: Welcome to the Grand Hotel. Check-in is at 3 PM and check-out is at 11 AM. Breakfast is served from 7 AM to 10 AM in the restaurant on the first floor. Free Wi-Fi is available in all rooms. If you need anything, please call the front desk.

questions.question: What time is check-out?

reading.text: Excuse me, I need to get to the airport. You can take the bus number 42 from the station. It leaves every 30 minutes. The trip takes about 45 minutes. A one-way ticket costs five dollars. You can buy it from the driver.
reading.translation: Someone asks for directions to the airport and gets bus information.

questions.question: How often does the bus leave?

reading.text: Today's specials: Grilled chicken with vegetables for twelve dollars. Fresh fish with rice for fifteen dollars. Vegetarian pasta for ten dollars. All specials include a drink and dessert. We also have gluten-free options. Please ask your server.

reading.text: I usually wake up at 6:30 AM. First, I take a shower and get dressed. Then I have breakfast, usually toast and orange juice. I leave the house at 7:45 and walk to the bus stop. I start work at 9 AM. During my lunch break, I go to a cafe near my office. I finish work at 5 PM and go to the gym three times a week.
reading.translation: A person describes their typical daily routine.

How often does the speaker go to the gym?

reading.text: Last weekend, I went to the farmer's market with my roommate. We bought fresh vegetables, fruit, and bread. In the afternoon, we cooked a big meal together. I made a salad and she made soup. After dinner, we watched a movie at home. It was a really nice day.

reading.text: I have a job interview tomorrow morning. I'm a little nervous but also excited. The company is a technology startup downtown. I need to wear a suit and arrive by 9 AM. I prepared by researching the company online and practicing common interview questions. I hope it goes well!

reading.text: My apartment building has a problem with the heating. The landlord said a technician will come on Thursday between 10 AM and 2 PM. Someone needs to be home to let them in. I asked my neighbor if she could help because I have to work. She said yes, which was very kind of her.
